log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Githzerai — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Githzerai — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Githzerai — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Githzerai — Iron Concentration HP: 47/67
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Githzerai — Iron Concentration HP: 29/67
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Githzerai — Iron Concentration HP: 11/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Githzerai — Iron Concentration --- HP: 11/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (11/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Githzerai — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Githzerai — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Githzerai — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Githzerai — Iron Concentration HP: -8/67
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):17+8=25 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Githzerai — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:4+4=8 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.

--- Githzerai — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
